strategy: Ada/SPARK-primary hypervisor with only tiny high-assurance C leaf boundaries where hardware interaction is impractical in pure SPARK

scope: similarly tiny hardware-boundary leaf code with fixed ABI contracts
constraints: must not own orchestration or security semantics
must use a fixed integer-only ABI boundary to Ada/SPARK
must provide MISRA C compliance evidence
must provide formal-verification or equivalent proof artifacts

current_focus: maintain Ada/SPARK as the authoritative implementation path
treat any remaining C as a temporary non-authoritative mirror or leaf boundary
grow the Ada hypercall-dispatch path over more of the frozen ABI call-id surface
extend Ada-side memory ownership, mapping, and W^X policy over more of the frozen ABI
extend Ada-side KCI control semantics over more of the frozen ABI
extend Ada-side partition control, audit mirror, and vCPU status coverage over more of the frozen ABI
extend Ada-side crypto-service and VM register coverage over more of the frozen ABI
extend Ada-side memory sharing and unmap semantics over more of the frozen ABI
extend Ada-side KSI shadow and atomic replacement semantics over more Tier B cases
extend Ada-side diagnostic and audit query coverage over the frozen ABI
prepare the assurance pipeline for any retained C leaf code
keep the retained C build on a strict warnings-as-errors baseline
keep compiler static analysis wired into repository acceptance
